title: chrysothamnus viscidiflorus var. linifolius
intro: Chrysothamnus viscidiflorus var. linifolius, also known as rabbitbrush, is a shrub that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Chrysothamnus viscidiflorus var. linifolius include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
